title: Chatbot Review Verdict
description:
Aggregated multi-LLM review verdict for a single chatbot PR. Written by /chatbot-iterate Step 4 after the Agent-tool subagents (or /octo:review) return. Read by Scripts/octo-auto-merge-decision.ps1 as one of the auto-merge gates.

File path: state/chatbot-reviews/<pr>.json (one file per PR).

branch.description: Source branch ref the review ran against.

headSha.description: Commit SHA the review evaluated. If a new commit lands, this file should be regenerated.

mechanism.description: Which review path produced this verdict. 'agent-tool-subagents' is the proven mechanism per feedback_multi_llm_review_pays_off. 'octo-review-clean' uses Scripts/octo-review-clean.ps1 (PATH-scrubbed). 'octo-review-raw' is the raw /octo:review slash command (only valid if liveness check passed).

reviewers.description: Per-reviewer entries. At minimum: one code-reviewer + one security-auditor for the gate to count.

blockingCount.description: Findings with severity 'normal' (red) that must be resolved before merge.

uniqueFindings.description: Optional: findings this reviewer caught that no other reviewer did. Drives the gate-ledger ROI metric.

verdict.description: Aggregated verdict. 'pass' = all reviewers approve, no findings. 'nits-only' = approve-with-nits across the board, no blocking. 'blocking' = at least one request-changes or unresolved blocking finding. 'abstain' = reviewers errored / didn't return — gate is dark; do NOT trust as green.

blockingFindings.description: Aggregated blocking findings across reviewers. Empty unless verdict is 'blocking'.

notes.description: Free-form notes about the review (e.g., 'PATH-scrubbed due to Windows orchestrator bug').
